examples: They may also be friends of the chairman, so they are reluctant to upset the applecart.
Tom upset the other team's applecart by hitting a home run in the last inning and we won the game.
When he referred to that incident of last year, he upset the applecart and the whole deal fell through.
It's not that independence would necessarily upset the applecart, as the Scottish government, headed by an oil economist, appears to be alert to the industry's need for consistency.
For them Mr Musharraf has seriously upset the applecart.
